newsSince: Positive flow for AECOM: selected to the UK Government's $4.7B CPS2 construction-professional-services framework (June 22), won a wide-ranging US Department of Homeland Security contract, and is leaning into proprietary AI tools on major infrastructure work. This follows a May 2026 report with a second consecutive FY2026 guidance raise, record backlog and expanding margins; the +AI-driven power/data-center design and permitting backlog supports the engineering-bottleneck thesis. Stock down ~28% YTD.

sources.label: Construction Dive: AECOM profit boost from data centers, defense
Simply Wall St: AECOM valuation after raised 2026 guidance and contract wins
AECOM undervalued after DHS contract and AI push (Simply Wall St)
Insider Monkey — AECOM DHS nationwide contract

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent AI-node lens: engineering/permitting capacity is a genuine hidden bottleneck for power/DC projects. Record $26.2B backlog, 1.2 design book-to-burn, raised FY guidance and record design pipeline materially strengthen the case. The -28% YTD makes a fundamentally improving DC-design platform look under-owned — up.
verdicts.bull: Record backlog + raised guidance; capital-light DC design fees across power/cooling/grid/permitting.
verdicts.neutral: Large, diversified consultancy; DC is one of several end-markets.
verdicts.bear: Government/infrastructure exposure; -28% YTD reflects funding/sentiment overhang.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI-DC design pipeline conversion; backlog burn at higher margins.
